text: Doctor ne bol diya ki ye bas stress hai par mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai aur bas rona nikal raha hai, mujhe gaon ki bohot yaad aa rahi hai. Is bade shehar mein bhasha ki vajah se koi mera dukh nahi samajhta, bas aisa lag raha hai jaise main kisi gahre gaddhe mein gir raha hoon. Abhi main placement ya padhai ke baare mein kuch nahi soch sakta, bas ye ghutan khatam ho jaye kaise bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F — mirror emotional overwhelm quality only (Sequential primary), not the stressor; reflect the 'gahre gaddhe' sinking feeling to make Seeker feel heard without rushing to content.
text: Yaar... jo tune abhi share kiya — yeh 'gahre gaddhe mein girna' wali feeling — woh sun ke hi dil bhaari ho gaya. Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar se kuch dab raha hai, kuch aisa jo shabdon mein poora aata bhi nahi. Main yahaan hoon, bol.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: koi mera dukh nahi samajhta
text: Haan yaar... bas ek anjaana sa dard hai. Yahaan sab log apni zindagi mein busy hain, koi poochh bhi nahi leta. Ghar pe call karta hoon toh woh log bhi kehte hain 'adjust kar lo', par unhe kya pata yahan ka haal. Bohot akela mehsoos ho raha hai, samajhna mushkil hai khud ke liye bhi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas aisa lag raha hai jaise main kisi gahre gaddhe mein gir raha hoon
text: Pichle teen-chaar mahine se. Jab se college mein aaya hoon. Yahaan log ek alag bhasha mein bolte hain, ek alag tarah ke hain. Mujhe nahi pata main unse kaise baat karun. Apna gaon, apne log, apni bhasha — sab kuch door ho gaya ek jhatke mein. Wahan sab jaante the mujhe, yahaan main bas ek unkown chehra hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F — mirror the emotional quality of sudden loss — 'ek jhatke mein sab door' — without naming stressor specifically; Sequential requires feeling mirror not content mirror.
text: Teen-chaar mahine... aur ek jhatke mein sab kuch badal gaya. Pehchaan, apnapan, woh jagah jahaan 'tum kaun ho' poochha nahi jaata tha — sab ek saath chhin gaya jaisa laga. Yeh jo toot-sa mehsoos ho raha hai andar, woh samajh aa raha hai mujhe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: koi mera dukh nahi samajhta
text: Haan bilkul. Aur yahan agar kuch bolta hoon toh log samjhte nahi, haste hain ya phir ignore karte hain. Ek baar mess mein kuch bol diya apni bhasha mein toh sab dekhne lage jaise main koi ajeeb insaan hoon. Sharam mehsoos hui. Tab se aur bhi chup ho gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E — softly mirror the implied fear underneath the silence: being seen as 'other', the feared consequence of speaking up; this opens a deeper layer while still in exploration.
text: Woh ek pal mess mein — jab sab ne dekha — aisa laga jaise apni hi jagah mein paraya ho gaya. Aur tab se jo chup aa gayi hai, lagta hai woh darr bhi hai shayad — ki agar bolunga toh phir se wahi hoga. Sahi pakda?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas aisa lag raha hai jaise main kisi gahre gaddhe mein gir raha hoon
text: Haan. Aur ek aur cheez hai — ghar wale sochte hain main yahaan padh ke bada aadunga, unka sapna hai. Main unhe batana nahi chahta ki aisa lag raha hai kyunki woh zyada pareshan ho jaayenge. Toh andar hi andar daba ke rakha hai. Khud se bhi nahi bola tha aaj se pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C — mirror the relational element: the weight of carrying ghar walon ka sapna alone, protecting them by going silent; this is the core conflict beginning to surface in Sequential coping.
text: Dono taraf se andar sama liya tune — yahaan ka dard bhi, ghar walon ko bachane ki zimmedari bhi. Aur yeh sab ek akele insaan ke andar chup ke baith gaya. Aaj pehli baar bahar aaya hai — kuch toh hai jo tujhe yahaan laaya bolne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: koi mera dukh nahi samajhta
text: Haan yaar... bohot zyada ho gaya tha andar. Thoda halka laga bol ke. Par abhi bhi samajh nahi aa raha ki kya karoon. Yahaan friend bhi nahi bana paaya koi — sab apne groups mein hain. Main wahan fit nahi hota lagta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D — mirror the duration of not fitting in, the ongoing daily experience of being on the outside of every circle, to invite more disclosure before moving to insight.
text: Teen-chaar mahine — har din uth ke, har meal mein, har class ke baad — wahi ek feeling ki main iss jagah ka hissa nahi hoon. Itne dino ka bojh hai yeh. Halka laga bol ke — acha kiya tu ne share kiya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutan
text: Woh ghutan... wohi sabse buri hai. Jab gaon mein tha toh sab log baat karte the bina kisi reason ke. Yahaan toh everyone is purposeful — agar koi kaam nahi hai toh baat hi nahi. Mujhe nahi pata iss tarah ki zindagi se kaise adjust karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F — mirror the contrast of emotional worlds: the free-flowing belonging of gaon vs transactional city life; this is the final exploration turn deepening before phase transition.
text: Gaon mein woh apnapan — bina matlab ke, bas hona kaafi tha. Yahaan sirf kaam ke rishte hain. Aur uss farq ko roz jeena padta hai tujhe. Yeh ghutan koi kamzori nahi hai — yeh do alag duniyaon ke beech khade hone ka dard hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas aisa lag raha hai jaise main kisi gahre gaddhe mein gir raha hoon
text: Do alag duniyaon ke beech... haan sahi bola. Main na gaon ka raha, na yahaan ka. Ek beech wali jagah mein atka hoon. Jab wahan ka sochta hoon toh dil bhaari ho jaata hai, aur yahaan ka sochta hoon toh darr lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C8 + Sequential → GRIEF/LOSS OF BELONGING; reflect the named core conflict (na gaon ka, na yahaan ka) with 'Lagta hai' framing to name the grief underneath the numbness.
text: Lagta hai yeh jo andar chhal raha hai — yeh sirf akela hone ka dard nahi. Yeh uss jagah ke kho jaane ka dukh hai jahan tu sach mein jaana jaata tha. Apni bhasha mein, apne logon mein. Woh jaana — woh ek tarah ka bichhadna tha, jo abhi bhi andar se nahi gaya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: koi mera dukh nahi samajhta
text: Haan yaar... bichhadna. Sahi word hai. Lagta hai mujhe yeh nahi pata tha ki woh sab itna miss karunga. Wahan ki choti-choti baatein — chai ki dukaan, kheton ki khushboo — yahaan kuch bhi woh nahi hai. Aur agar kisi ko bolta hoon toh woh kehte hain 'homesick ho, adjust ho jaayega' — par yeh itna simple nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate grief as culturally real and normal for someone leaving a close-knit rural/Hindi Belt community for a metro; separate his worth from his ability to 'adjust'; name what he felt accurately.
text: Yeh jo tu feel kar raha hai — yeh 'homesick' waala chhota lafz iske liye kaafi nahi. Gaon se bade shehar mein aana — woh sirf jagah nahi badlti, poori duniya badal jaati hai. Teri bhasha, teri pehchaan, tera apnapan — sab ek saath. Iska dard asli hai. Aur yeh dard feel karna teri kamzori nahi — yeh is baat ka saboot hai ki tu apni jado se kitna gehra juda tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutan
text: Yeh sun ke thoda achha laga. Kyunki main soch raha tha ki shayad main hi weak hoon — dusre log toh adjust kar lete hain. Par abhi bhi woh ghutan kaafi hai — class mein bhi dimaag yahaan nahi hota, labs mein bhi koi nahi. Aur assignments pile ho rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One-time systemic anecdote from the Seeker's world — C8 + metro migration reality — to normalise that this silence is structural and cultural, not individual failure. Never a solution.
text: Pehle yeh — 'weak hoon' waali baat — bohot common hai is situation mein. Jo log gaon ya chote shehar se bade campus aate hain, unhe yeh sab feel hota hai — sirf tu nahi. Lekin koi bolega nahi, kyunki lagta hai 'adjust nahi kar paaya' bol ke judge ho jaayenge. Toh sab chup rehte hain, aur sab akele lete rehte hain. Tera akela nahi hai yeh dard.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: koi mera dukh nahi samajhta
text: Sach mein? Aur maine socha tha sirf mera problem hai. Toh kya koi aur bhi aisa feel karta hoga campus pe? Kabhi baat hi nahi hoti na inke baare mein. Thoda halka laga yeh sun ke. Par ab aage kya karoon — yahaan rehna hai abhi, padhai bhi karni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second affirmation: connect the cultural reality of silence around displacement to the Seeker's specific situation; reaffirm that voicing it today is meaningful progress, not a sign of being stuck.
text: Haan, kai log hote hain — par yeh baat hoti nahi campus pe, kyunki sab apni 'strong' image banaye rakhna chahte hain. Aur tu aaj yahan tak aaya — bolne ki himmat ki — woh chhoti baat nahi. Iska matlab yeh nahi ki tu ruk gaya hai. Iska matlab yeh hai ki andar se kuch soch raha hai aage ka.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutan
text: Haan shayad. Main bas chahta hoon ki yeh ghutan thodi kam ho. Aur koi ek dost ho — ek bhi kaafi hai — jiske saath baat ho sake bina soche samjhe. Ab kya karoon is sab ka?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas aisa lag raha hai jaise main kisi gahre gaddhe mein gir raha hoon
text: Cultural society waali baat acchi lagi. Mujhe pata nahi tha aisi cheez hoti hai campus pe. Ek baar dekhunga. Notes wala bhi try kar sakta hoon — bahana toh hai baat karne ka. Likhna wala thoda ajeeb lagta hai par shayad... try kar sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk the cultural society suggestion step by step — simplest, most persona-appropriate option first. One-time use. Keep it under 3 small steps, no pressure, no new obligation.
text: Yeh wala try karte hain step by step: Pehle — college ke notice board ya student portal pe 'cultural' ya apne state ka naam daalo search mein — sirf dekh lena, kuch join karna zaruri nahi. speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: koi mera dukh nahi samajhta
text: Itna kaafi hai — theek hai. Portal check karna toh main aaj hi kar sakta hoon. Shayad koi group mil jaaye apne state ka — tab toh apni bhasha mein baat ho sakti hai. Yeh sochke hi thoda better lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One systemic reframe: C8 migration reality — language barrier on metro campuses is structural, not a personal failing; use Seeker's own vocabulary (bhasha, shehar, gaon) to normalise.

Is mein galat kuch nahi hua tera — yeh ek uneven ground hai jahan kaafi log atke rehte hain. Teri apni bhasha teri taakat hai, bujha dene ki cheez nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutan
text: Meri bhasha meri taakat — yeh alag angle hai. Kabhi aisa nahi socha. Main use chhupaata tha yahaan. Shayad yahaan bhi ek group milega jahan woh chhupaani na pade. Ghutan thodi kam ho jaayegi tab.

speaker: Supporter

Option ke taur pe rakhna zehan mein, zaruri nahi abhi jaana.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas aisa lag raha hai jaise main kisi gahre gaddhe mein gir raha hoon
text: Haan, pata tha campus pe hota hai par kabhi seriously nahi liya. Shayad ek baar dekh sakta hoon kya hota hai wahan. Abhi toh cultural group wala try karna hai — phir dekhte hain. Aaj baat karke bahut better feel hua yaar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close affirmation: validate what the Seeker did today — spoke for the first time — as meaningful; connect to the cultural reality that this silence is common and breaking it is its own step.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: koi mera dukh nahi samajhta
text: Haan dheere dheere. Main abhi yeh soch ke nahi chala tha ki itna kuch khul jaayega aaj. Lagta hai andar se kuch pressure release hua hai. Gaon ki yaad phir bhi aayegi, par shayad ab thoda better handle ho sake.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final INFORMATION use: normalise that gaon ki yaad — homesickness grief — doesn't disappear, it changes shape; use Seeker's vocab to reframe it as connection not just pain.

Dheerey dheerey woh yaad ek bojh se ek sahara banna shuru hoti hai — jab yahaan bhi kuch apna milna shuru ho jaata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutan
text: Sahara banna shuru ho — haan yeh sun ke achha laga. Abhi woh ghutan zyada hai par ab kuch direction dikh raha hai. Portal check karunga, group dhundunga, aur raat ko likhne wala bhi try karunga. Dekh lete hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E — gently mirror the emerging shift: from sinking in the gaddha to having a direction, without overstating it; honour that ghutan is still there while noticing the small change.
text: Ghutan abhi bhi hai — par aaj ke pehle woh gaddha sirf gahira lagta tha. Aur ab ek haath hai, ek raasta dikh raha hai thoda. Woh farq chhota nahi hai. Teen kaam — portal, group, ek line raat ko — bas itna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas aisa lag raha hai jaise main kisi gahre gaddhe mein gir raha hoon
text: Haan — teen kaam, bas itna. Zyada nahi sochna abhi. Jab bhi woh gaddha wali feeling aayi, toh bohot overwhelm hua tha. Aaj thoda kam laga. Shukriya yaar, sach mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C — final relational mirror: reflect that he came to this conversation alone and leaves with small but real anchors; honour the connection made today without over-stating it.
text: Aaj akele aaya tha, aur aaj pehli baar kisi ne suna — yeh bhi ek rishta tha, apne tarah ka. Teri bhasha, tera gaon, tera dard — sab yahaan accept hua. Woh teen kaam kar — aur agar kabhi phir gaddha gehra lage toh jaanta hai kahan aa sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: koi mera dukh nahi samajhta
text: Haan, aaj kisi ne samjha — 'koi mera dukh nahi samajhta' woh soch thi, aaj woh thodi badli. Teen kaam karta hoon aaj raat. Phir dekhenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D — final turn: mirror the temporal shift from months of silence to today's small but real opening; close warmly without over-promising or inviting dependency.
text: Teen-chaar mahine ki chup ke baad — aaj ek shaam mein itna kuch. Woh gaddha abhi bhi hai, par aaj tune ek baar oopar dekha. Woh teen kaam kar — portal, group, ek line — bas itna. Apna khayal rakh.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag mein ek ajeeb si hulchul machi hai aur main dher ho gaya hoon
text: Jab Doctor ne meri takleef ko halke mein liya toh mera dil baith gaya aur main hostel ke kone mein baith kar ghanton bilakh-bilakh kar roya. Akelepan ne mujhe itna nichod diya hai ki ab JEE ki coaching ka khayal aate hi meri aatma kaanp jati hai. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha aage kya hoga, bas dimaag mein ek ajeeb si hulchul machi hai aur main dher ho gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk flag active — one warm normalising line before strategy. text: Yaar, akele itna sehna… bahut bhaari hota hai, aur yeh bata ke bahut himmat ki tumne. Jab tum keh rahe ho ki dimaag mein ek ajeeb si hulchul machi hai aur tum bilkul dher ho gaye ho — woh feeling jo hai na, woh andar se kuch toot jaane jaisi lagti hai. Jaise ek dam se sab kuch ek saath beh aaya ho aur koi tha hi nahi paas mein jab woh hua.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: hostel ke kone mein akele ghanton roya, koi nahi tha
text: Haan yaar, bilkul waise hi laga. Main wahan hostel ke us kone mein ghanton roya, koi nahi tha paas mein. Ghar se itni door hoon, matlab hoon — parents ko bhi kya bataaun, woh tension mein aa jayenge. Toh bas andar hi andar sab ghoomta rehta hai. Woh hulchul ab bhi hai, khatam hi nahi hoti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and isolation of carrying this alone using Lens D (time/duration mirror). Sequential rule: stressor still not probed. text: Ghanton… aur woh bhi akele. Aur yeh jo hulchul hai na, woh ek din ya do din ki baat nahi — tumhare shabad sun ke lagta hai yeh kaafi waqt se andar hi andar pal rahi hai. Ghar se door, parents ko protect karna, doctor ne bhi woh nahi diya jo chahiye tha — itna sab andar sambhaalte rehna, bina kisi ke jaane… yeh bahut thaka dene waali jagah hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: yahan koi apna nahi lagta, sab apni apni life mein hain
text: Haan yaar, thaka dene waali hi jagah hai. Yahan coaching mein sab log competition mein lage hain, koi kisi ka nahi hai. Sab apni apni life mein hain. Tab se hostel ka woh kona hi mera theek lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of being invisible and unseen using Lens E (feared consequence mirror). speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aatma kaanp jaati hai coaching ka naam sunke, samajh nahi aa raha kya hoga aage
text: Haan… wahi toh hai. Aur upar se JEE ka pressure — coaching mein itne saare bacche hain jo din raat padhte hain. Main bhi padh raha hoon, par andar se kuch hai jo rok raha hai. Coaching ka naam sunke hi aatma kaanp jaati hai. Ghar waalon ne itni umeedein rakhi hain, itne paison ka intezaam kiya gaya hai. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha aage kya hoga — yeh hulchul band hi nahi hoti.

strategy_intent: Core conflict now surfacing — ghar waalon ki umeedein + JEE pressure + inner paralysis. Mirror the relational weight using Lens C (relational element mirror). speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main kamzor nahi hoon par pata nahi kyun yeh sab ho raha hai mujhse
text: Haan bilkul. Aur fir main sochta hoon — yaar main pagal toh nahi ho raha? Matlab itne saare bacche hai JEE dete hain, sab cope karte hain toh main kyun nahi kar pa raha. Main kamzor nahi hoon par pata nahi kyun yeh sab ho raha hai mujhse. Doctor se bhi yahi lagta tha shayad unhone bhi yahi socha — ki yeh zyada soch raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: STIGMA CUE active — turn must be Restatement only, shorter than previous Supporter turn, ends with soft pause not a question. text: Jab khud apna aap ko hi shak ki nazar se dekhne lagta hai insaan — ki main hi toh galat nahi hoon na — woh thakaan alag hi qisam ki hoti hai. Doctor ne bhi wahi kiya jo tumhare andar ki ek awaaz kar rahi thi — dismiss. Aur fir woh hulchul aur gehri ho jaati hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ki yaad aati hai, woh sab kuch miss karta hoon jo tha wahan

text: Jao yaar — Ramkhelawan bhai wait kar rahe hain. Aaj sadak pe baithe the, dum ghut raha tha — aur ab shift se pehle ek dost ke saath ho. Gaon se yahaan aana, karz uthana, sab kuch ghar ke liye dena — yeh sab tumne kiya. Par tum sirf jo bhejte ho woh nahi ho — tum woh bhi ho jo Maa ki awaaz sunke roya, jo aaj yahan aaya, jo Ramkhelawan bhai ke paas ja raha hai. Khyaal rakhna apna.
